form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 8th over 2850m at this track beaten 20m by Lou Du Donjon in 5yo mare race on February 20 at $10. The run prior 8th over 2700m at this track, beaten 12m by Latika Bella in 5yo mare race on January 24 at $25. Watch for a far better effort this time.

form.formComment: Last start good run when 2nd over 2700m at this track, beaten a 0.1m by Lutece D'ela in 5yo mare race on April 4 at $14. Two runs back posted a big 4 m win at Mons beating Let's Go Des Plans in on March 3. Capable of another big run.

form.formComment: 4th over 2150m at Enghien beaten 8.1m by Lannister D'avril in 5-6yo claiming on March 24 at $12. Before that disqualified at Enghien on March 17 over 2875m. Can't see her troubling these.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 9.6m finishing fourth behind Faharajah One at Enghien over 2150m in a 5-6yo mare euro open restricted race on March 10 at $22. form.formComment: Resuming after four months off the scene. Finished off last preparation when beaten by 4.2m finishing second behind Lea D'atout at this track over 2175m in a 4yo fillies race on December 13 at $3.40. Going nicely and looks a top chance.

form.formComment: Returns to racing after a spell of three-and-a-half months. Well beaten at the end of her last preparation at this course when ninth at very long odds behind Florida Bi. Hasn't won for 13 months, so it's hard to be over-confident.
